---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an addition or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A short description of what you want.

## Motivation

Why is this useful? What problem does it solve or what workflow does it enable?

## Proposed behavior

How should it work? Be as specific as you can — UI behavior, API shape, config options.

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you thought about and why you prefer this one.

## Checklist

- [ ] This feature is consistent with FinPilot's local-first, no-telemetry principles
- [ ] This feature does not require API keys to be sent to the browser
- [ ] If this touches backtesting, I've considered temporal integrity implications
- [ ] If this touches live trading, I've considered whether guardrails still apply
